sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>

# Move the pair left one more time
predict(expect_change=True, note='Moving pair left again to align with yellow segment columns')
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 61}])

# Check result
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

print("Result:", last_action_result)

# Show small object changes
after_seg = after.segmentation

print("\n=== AFTER (small objects) ===")
for n in after_seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] < 500:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)} hash={n['hash']}")

# Check if level completed
if last_action_result.get('level_completed') or last_action_result.get('done'):
    print("LEVEL COMPLETED!")
else:
    print("Level not yet complete")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
